zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Neville於1387年出生在英國達勒姆斯泰德洛普時，她的父親Ralph Neville24歲，母親Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland23歲。她於1399年7月20日之前與Sir Thomas Dacre在英國英格蘭波藍德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1453年7月8日之後在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa Neville于1387年出生在英国達勒姆斯泰德洛普时，她的父亲Ralph Neville24岁，母亲Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland23岁。她于1399年7月20日之前与Sir Thomas Dacre在英国英格兰波藍德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1453年7月8日之后在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Newill

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Neville was born in 1387, in Staindrop, Durham, England, her father, Ralph Neville, was 24 and her mother, Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland, was 23. She married Sir Thomas Dacre before 20 July 1399, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 8 July 1453, in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Neville est née en 1387, à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Dacre avant 20 juillet 1399, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 8 juillet 1453, à Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Nevilleが1387年にイギリスダルハムスティインドロップで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは24歳，母Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmorelandは23歳であった。1399年7月20日以前にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドでSir Thomas Dacreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1453年7月8日以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Neville(이)가 1387년 영국 뒤람 스테인드럽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1399년 7월 20일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드에서 Sir Thomas Dacre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1453년 7월 8일 이후 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Neville nasceu em 1387, em Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Dacre antes 20 de julho de 1399, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 8 de julho de 1453, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Neville родилась в 1387 г. в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Dacre перед 20 июля 1399 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 8 июля 1453 г. в местности еркшир, Англия.
